testcases.input: heights = [4,2,7,6,9,14,12], bricks = 5, ladders = 1 Output: 4 Explanation: Starting at building 0, you can follow these steps: - Go to building 1 without using ladders nor bricks since 4 >= 2. - Go to building 2 using 5 bricks. You must use either bricks or ladders because 2 < 7. - Go to building 3 without using ladders nor bricks since 7 >= 6. - Go to building 4 using your only ladder. You must use either bricks or ladders because 6 < 9. It is impossible to go beyond building 4 because you do not have any more bricks or ladders.
